Bodytext.67108945: "The Output page specifies \"Add\" in the Combine Operation. The Combine Entity specifies which Noise type to use when combining with the attribute specified in the Combine Attritute Scope. Therefore noise is added to each point position and we see a deformed position as a result." "'The Output page provides a list of toggles for including different noise field types.\\n\\nAs well you can combine the noise with the specified lookup noise attribute. By default the Combine Operation parameter is set to Add so the noise is added to P in this example.\\n\\nFinally a Compute Point Normals parameter at the bottom of the Output page can be used to generate normals without the need to add a seperate Normals POP.'"

*�����������������NThis examaple uses 2 separate scalar noise components - "NoiseA" and "NoiseB". It's easy to operate on each noise attribute seperately, and in this example a Limit POP is used to clamp each noise attribute to be above 0. The two noises are then multiplied together and added back to P.z in the Math Mix POP. 

This exmaple uses 2 seperate scalar noise components - "noiseA" and "noiseB". It's easy to operate on each noise attribute seperately, and in this example a Limit POP is used to clamp each noise attribute. The noise is then multiplied together and added back to P.z in mathmix.
